name: discord-bot-live-setup
title: Invite and run Discord forwarder bot on live server
description: Operational setup of the existing discord-bot/ forwarder: create the Discord application, invite the bot to the team server (guild install, minimal read-only perms), fill discord-bot/.env, and run it end-to-end so messages from mapped channels land in Firestore. Code already exists (task 06-02-discord-forwarder-bot-and-message-ingest); this task is config + deploy only, no code changes expected.
creator: gitsync
notes: Discord application client_id: 1511330041709985792. Install type: Guild Install (integration_type=0). Bot needs only View Channels (1<<10) + Read Message History (1<<16) = permissions 66560; plus Message Content Intent enabled in the Bot tab. User's generated invite URL had 2 extra perms (Send Messages, Create Public Threads, permissions=34359806976) - harmless but not needed. Firebase project id: gitsync-645b3, region asia-east1. DISCORD_INGEST_SECRET must match between discord-bot/.env and the Cloud Function (functions/.secret.local for emulator, Secret Manager for prod).
